zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Carminow於大約1351年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親Sir Walter Carminow31歲，母親Alice Tynten28歲。他於1393年與Margaret Kelly在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他在英國英格蘭戴文被列為sheriff of devon。他去世於1407年3月4日在他的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Carminow于大约1351年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲Sir Walter Carminow31岁，母亲Alice Tynten28岁。他于1393年与Margaret Kelly在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他在英国英格兰戴文被列为sheriff of devon。他去世于1407年3月4日在他的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Carminow was born about 1351, in Cornwall, England, his father, Sir Walter Carminow, was 31 and his mother, Alice Tynten, was 28. He married Margaret Kelly in 1393, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. His occupation is listed as sheriff of devon in Devon, England, United Kingdom. He died on 4 March 1407, in his hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Carminow est né environ 1351, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter Carminow, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice Tynten, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Kelly en 1393, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of devon à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 4 mars 1407, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Carminow um 1351 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter Carminow 31 und seine Mutter Alice Tynten 28. Er hat 1393 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Margaret Kelly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. sein Beruf ist als sheriff of devon in Devon, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. März 1407 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Carminow è nato il circa 1351 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Sir Walter Carminow, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Alice Tynten, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Kelly nel 1393, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of devon nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 4 marzo 1407, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Carminowが約1351年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Carminowは31歳，母Alice Tyntenは28歳であった。1393年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでMargaret Kellyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。イギリスイギリスデボンでの職業はsheriff of devonと記録されている。彼は1407年3月4日に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Carminow(이)가 대략 1351년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter Carminow(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Tynten(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Margaret Kelly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 sheriff of devon이었다. 그는 1407년 3월 4일 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Carminow nasceu aproximadamente 1351, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Walter Carminow, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice Tynten, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Kelly em 1393, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff of devon em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 4 de março de 1407, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Carminow родился около 1351 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Walter Carminow было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Tynten, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Kelly в 1393 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына.  Он работал по профессии sheriff of devon в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 4 марта 1407 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Carminow nació aproximadamente 1351, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Walter Carminow, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alice Tynten, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Margaret Kelly en 1393, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff of devon en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1407, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
